cases.prompt: 이 작업들 여러 창에서 병렬로 진행해줘.

assertions.text: Splits the work into N independent tasks and calls model-router for per-task LLM assignment
Shows a dispatch plan table (Task ID, Type, Model, Terminal, cost estimate) before launching
Launches each task in its own terminal (e.g. Windows Terminal tabs via wt.exe) and reports launched terminal IDs

cases.prompt: Dispatch these 4 subtasks across multiple terminals with the best model for each.

assertions.text: Assigns a primary + fallback model per task type via model-router
Estimates cost and confirms with the user when total exceeds $5; runs destructive ops single-terminal only
Produces a merged result report after all terminals complete
